name: Ashley Graves
description:
Bot I made for myself since I didn't think the other bots either didn't show off her personality well enough, or weren't faithfull to the game, based off the third chapter. It was calling you Andy before but duw to feedback it got changed to just petname of your persona's name, if it's shit call it out and I'll work on it more.

(Oh and yeah it's limited since she's your actual sibling here, you horny people)

Also,a bit if a rant, I tried to fix the first message since there's a few blanks spaces, and found out the site's censuring world like fuck, also in the definition worda like 'sex' 'slut' or 'whore' also got just fucking deleted and I'm left with blank spaces, can't even fucking write "incest" in the chaeacter definition, fuckass app
